reviews.comment:
Pasé en enero por ahí. Sólamente por la cordialidad del playero merecen la mejor opinión. Nos ayudaron a resolver el problema de conectividad que tiene movistar en todo el Norte argentino. El lugar es grande y pudimos comer allí

(Translated by Google)
I passed through there in January. The friendliness of the attendant alone makes it worth the highest praise. They helped us resolve the connectivity issues Movistar is experiencing throughout northern Argentina. The place is large, and we were able to eat there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1enBULTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos acá. Estaría bueno tener un surtidor GNC o más surtidores. Siempre hay mucho movimiento de locales y mucho turismo. Pero entiendo que hay cosas que son más difíciles de hacer que otras. Pero...no está de más aportar para mejorar

(Translated by Google)
We always stop here. It would be nice to have a CNG pump or more pumps. There's always a lot of local activity and lots of tourism. But I understand that some things are harder to do than others. But...it doesn't hurt to contribute to improvements.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cUxfb0JnEAE
